mapper.select: select * from ygt_member_benefit_log where ygt_mbl_join_source_id = #{joinSourceId} order by ygt_member_benefit_log_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_member_benefit_log (ygt_mbl_join_source_id, ygt_mbl_customer_user_id, ygt_mbl_benefit_code, ygt_mbl_benefit_name, ygt_mbl_discount_text, ygt_mbl_use_channel, ygt_mbl_status, ygt_mbl_create_time) values (#{ygtMblJoinSourceId}, #{ygtMblCustomerUserId}, #{ygtMblBenefitCode}, #{ygtMblBenefitName}, #{ygtMblDiscountText}, #{ygtMblUseChannel}, #{ygtMblStatus}, #{ygtMblCreateTime})
mapper.update: update ygt_member_benefit_log set ygt_mbl_status = #{ygtMblStatus} where ygt_member_benefit_log_id = #{ygtMemberBenefitLogId}
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_member_benefit_log where ygt_member_benefit_log_id in #{id}
